name: The Golf Lab
address: 14240 Sullyfield Cir suite j, Chantilly, VA 20151
about: The Golf Lab is an indoor golf training facility located in Chantilly, VA, offering professional golf lessons and club repairs. Utilizing high-tech equipment and software, the facility identifies swing flaws for players of all skill levels. It features an indoor screen golf practice area with video swing analysis capabilities, allowing for year-round practice regardless of weather. The space was renovated in 2018 to enhance the training experience with modern technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional swing analysis using high-tech software
Year-round indoor practice with screen golf technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The Golf Lab provides professional golf lessons and club repairs, but it doesn't specify if they supply clubs. It's recommended to bring your own or inquire about rentals when booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any on-site food or drink service, but doesn't explicitly state a policy on outside food and drinks. It's best to call ahead to confirm.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for a full 18-hole simulation. As a golf training facility, sessions are typically focused on lessons and practice rather than playing full rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Lab explicitly states they teach golf lessons for beginners to professionals of all ages, making it suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
